value.0: A Rashemi woman with pale skin and light, wind-tangled hair braided with small bone and silver charms marking her as Ethran. Her sharp grey eyes carry the quiet intensity of one trained in both temple rites and arcane study, and faint sigils of Mystra are inked along her wrists. She dresses in layered furs and robes, practical for the cold but embroidered with subtle glyphwork that glimmers when she channels magic.
